trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo's 2025-05-22 test lists Frollini and ALCE NERO as top biscuits, providing fresh official recommendations.
